description_long: This is a compact, retro-styled electric scooter with a predominantly orange and yellow body, designed for urban commuting. It features a sturdy metal frame, a single front headlight, and a rearview mirror mounted on the left handlebar. The scooter has two padded seats, with the rear seat equipped with a backrest and side handles for passenger comfort. The wheels are solid and robust, with visible mudguards and a kickstand for stability when parked. The deck is wide and flat, providing ample foot space, and the rear section includes a small luggage rack. Subtle wear and dirt on the surfaces suggest regular use in city environments.
description: A retro orange and yellow electric scooter with two padded seats, a rear luggage rack, and a single headlight, designed for urban commuting.
description_view_0: Front view showing the headlight, handlebars with a left-side mirror, and the front wheel with a mudguard.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the two padded seats, rear backrest, side handles, and the full length of the deck and wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backrest, luggage rack, taillight, and the rear wheel assembly.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the scooter's body, rear star decal, and the arrangement of the seats and wheels.
attribute_deck_design: wide, flat, and solid with a slightly textured surface for grip
attribute_brand_logo: star-shaped white decal on rear side panel
